creator: junovitch@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 158553
Poudriere testport log from 10.1-RELEASE jail

Per the log the builds were done with the WPS_NFC set to on to ensure the change was hit at compile time.
...
     WPS_NFC=on: Near Field Communication (NFC) configuration
...

Builds were also done on all supported releases along with CURRENT.
8.4-RELEASE-p31 amd64
8.4-RELEASE-p31 i386
9.3-RELEASE-p17 amd64
9.3-RELEASE-p17 i386
10.1-RELEASE-p14 amd64
10.1-RELEASE-p14 i386
11.0-CURRENT r284725 amd64
11.0-CURRENT r284725 i386
